recipes.title: Savory French Toast Sticks
recipes.description: ⭐Savory French Toast Sticks made with bread, eggs, milk and grated cheese. Perfect for breakfast.
steps: Cut bread into sticks.
Whisk eggs with milk, cheese, salt, pepper, and chili.
Dip sticks and fry until golden on each side.
Serve warm with grated cheese sprickled on it.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Cut bread into sticks.
Whisk eggs, milk, cheese and spices.
Dip bread sticks into mixture.
Fry until golden on each side.
Arrange on a plate and sprickle with grated cheese.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: Use slightly stale bread for better texture.

leftovers.storage: Store in fridge in airtight container

recipes.title: Sweet Pan Bread
recipes.description: ⭐Sweet pan flatbreads made from flour, sugar, and water. Lightly browned, firm on the outside, and chewy inside. Simple, filling, and made with what you already have.
ingredients: (Optional if you have it: a pinch of salt or oil)
steps: Mix flour and sugar.
Add water little by little and mix until you get a soft dough.
Knead for 3 minutes.
Divide into small balls and flatten them.
Fry each panbread for about 1–2 minutes per side until lightly golden.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
In a bowl, Mix Flour and sugar together.
Add water little by little and mix until you get a soft dough (not sticky).
Knead for 3 minutes and add little flour to make sure it is not sticky.
Heat a dry pan on medium heat.
Add cooking oil and heat.
Fry each panbread for about 2 minutes per side until lightly golden.
Arrange on a plate.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: Once kneaded, fry the dough within 4 minutes. Waiting longer can make it wet and harder to cook.

leftovers.storage: Store in fridge in airtight container

recipes.title: Plantain Nachos
recipes.description: ⭐Crispy plantain nachos made with ripe plantains, melted cheese, and fresh toppings. A perfect snack or party appetizer with a savory crunch.
ingredients: Sour cream or yogurt for topping
steps: Slice the plantains thinly and toss with olive oil and salt.
Bake at 180°C (350°F) for 20 minutes until crispy.
Remove from oven and top with shredded cheese and diced toppings.
Bake for 5 more minutes until the cheese melts.
Serve warm with a dollop of sour cream or yogurt.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F).
Slice plantains thinly and toss with olive oil and salt.
Spread on a baking tray and bake for 20 minutes until crispy.
Top with shredded cheese and diced toppings.
Bake for 5 more minutes until cheese melts.
Serve warm with sour cream or yogurt.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: Use very ripe plantains for a naturally sweeter, crispier chip.

leftovers.storage: Store in fridge in airtight container
leftovers.reheat: Bake at 180°C for 5 minutes to re-crisp

recipes.title: Peanut Butter Apple Nachos
recipes.description: ⭐Crisp, sweet, and drizzled with creamy peanut butter. These Peanut Butter Apple Nachos are the perfect quick snack when you want something fresh but still a little indulgent. Thin apple slices are topped with peanut butter, chocolate drizzle, and a sprinkle of granola for a fun, no‑bake treat that's ready in minutes. Great for after‑school snacking, light desserts, or a healthier twist on classic nachos.
steps: Cut apples into thin slices.
Layer apple slices on a plate.
Melt peanut butter and drizzle it on the layered apples.
Add the chocolate drizzle as well and sprickle the granola or crushed nuts.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Wash and cut apple into thin slices.
Layer apple slices on a plate.
Melt peanut butter in microwave for 20 seconds.
Drizzle melted peanut butter over the apple slices.
Add chocolate drizzle and sprinkle granola or crushed nuts.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: Use a tart apple like Granny Smith to balance the sweetness of the peanut butter.

leftovers.storage: Best eaten fresh — apples brown quickly once sliced

recipes.title: Spicy Peanut Butter Popcorn
recipes.description: ⭐Spicy Peanut Butter Popcorn made with popcorn, peanut butter and honey. Perfect for movie nights and small snacks.
steps: Melt peanut butter, honey, and chili powder in a pot under low heat.
Pour over already cooked popcorn and mix evenly.
Let cool slightly before serving.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Pop your popcorn and set aside in a large bowl.
Add peanut butter, honey, and chili powder to a small pot.
Melt on low heat, stirring until smooth.
Pour the mixture over the popcorn and mix evenly.
Add a pinch of salt and toss once more.
Let cool for 2 minutes before serving.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: Work quickly when mixing — the coating sets fast as it cools.

leftovers.storage: Store in an airtight bag or container at room temperature

recipes.title: Instant Ramen Taco
recipes.description: ⭐Instant Ramen Taco made with instant noodles, egg, lettuce and shredded cheese. Perfect for breakfast and tasty snacks.
ingredients: Lettuce, shredded chicken, spicy mayo(for filling)
steps: Cook noodles slightly, then mix with beaten egg.
Shape into small taco shells using foil molds.
Fry until crispy and golden.
Fill with your choice of toppings.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Boil noodles for 2 minutes — slightly undercooked.
Drain and mix noodles with 1 beaten egg.
Shape noodle mix into taco shells using foil molds.
Heat oil in a frying pan on medium heat.
Fry shells until crispy and golden on both sides.
Fill shells with lettuce, shredded chicken, and spicy mayo.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: Don't fully cook the noodles — they need to be slightly firm to hold their shape when fried.

leftovers.storage: Store shells and filling separately in the fridge
leftovers.reheat: Re-fry shells for 2 minutes to restore crispiness

recipes.title: Spicy Corn & Coconut Bites
recipes.description: ⭐Spicy Corn & Coconut Bites made with Sweet corn, Grated coconut, Lime juice and Chili flakes. Perfect for instant and tasty snacks.
steps: Mix corn, coconut, chili flakes, and salt in a bowl.
Squeeze lime juice into the mixture and mix.
Form the mixture into small balls and chill for 10min before serving.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Add corn, grated coconut, chili flakes, and salt to a bowl.
Squeeze lime juice over the mixture and stir well.
Roll the mixture into small balls.
Place on a plate and chill in the fridge for 10 minutes.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: If the mixture is too loose to roll, add a little more grated coconut to bind it.

leftovers.storage: Store in fridge in airtight container

recipes.title: Plantain Cinnamon Rolls
recipes.description: ⭐Plantain Cinnamon Rolls made with ripe plantain, ground cinnamon and butter. Perfect for appetizers.
steps: Peel the plantain and slice it lengthwise into very thin, flat strips.
Lightly bake the strips in a little butter for 3 minutes until soft and flexible (not crispy).
Mix sugar (or honey) with cinnamon in a small bowl.
Spread a thin layer of the cinnamon mix over each warm plantain strip.
Gently roll each strip like a cinnamon roll and secure with a toothpick(s) or skewer(s) if needed.
Let cool slightly and enjoy warm!

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Peel plantains and slice lengthwise into thin flat strips.
Fry strips in butter for 3 minutes until soft and flexible.
Mix sugar or honey with cinnamon in a small bowl.
Spread the cinnamon mix over each warm plantain strip.
Gently roll each strip and secure with a toothpick if needed.
Let cool slightly and serve warm.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: Make sure the plantain is very ripe (mostly black peel) — it's sweeter and more flexible for rolling.

leftovers.storage: Store in fridge in airtight container

recipes.title: Plantain Egg Cups
recipes.description: ⭐Plantain Egg Cups made with ripe plantain, egg and salt. Perfect for breakfast.
steps: Preheat your oven for 10 minutes to 180°C (350°F).
Slice the plantain into thin rounds.
Lightly grease muffin cups with oil and press the plantain slices into the bottom to form a base.
Crack an egg into each muffin cup over the plantain base.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt and pepper on each.
Bake for 12–15 minutes, or until the eggs are set to your liking.
Let them cool slightly before carefully removing from the muffin tin.

stepFlow.text: Ready? Swipe left to begin.
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F) for 10 minutes.
Slice plantains into thin rounds.
Grease muffin cups with oil.
Press plantain slices into the base of each muffin cup.
Crack one egg into each muffin cup.
Sprinkle salt and pepper over each cup.
Bake for 12–15 minutes until eggs are set.
Cool slightly and remove from tin.
Congratulations🎊, you have just completed this recipe.

notes.defaultTip: For runny yolks, bake for 12 minutes. For fully set eggs, go the full 15.

leftovers.storage: Store in fridge in airtight container
leftovers.reheat: Microwave for 30–45 seconds or oven at 160°C for 5 minutes
